TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tongan, title = tongan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tongan} }

S.FORM: tongan i Nantou a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu tongan. u kasalumaluma' nu tongan sa, 278 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 952 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 841 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 111 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u kasabinacadan, Seediq71%, Tayal9%, Amis2%, Bunun3%, Paiwan1%, Truku1%, zumazuma1%. 1 ku cacudadan i tongan niyzau'. 1 ku pakincalan i tongan niyazu'. 1 ku kyukay i tongan niyzau'.
S.PHON: toŋan i nantou a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu toŋan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu toŋan sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, səədi***%, tajar~ɾ*%, amis*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, truku*%, zumazuma*%. * ku ʦaʦudadan i toŋan nijzauʔ~ʡ. * ku pakinʦar~ɾan i toŋan nijazuʔ~ʡ. * ku kjukaj i toŋan nijzauʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: tongan i Nantou a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu tongan. u kasalumaluma' nu tongan sa, 278 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 952 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 841 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 111 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u kasabinacadan, Seediq71%, Tayal9%, Amis2%, Bunun3%, Paiwan1%, Truku1%, zumazuma1%. 1 ku cacudadan i tongan niyzau'. 1 ku pakincalan i tongan niyazu'. 1 ku kyukay i tongan niyzau'.
S.PHON: toŋan i nantou a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu toŋan. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu toŋan sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u kasabinaʦadan, səədi***%, tajar~ɾ*%, amis*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, truku*%, zumazuma*%. * ku ʦaʦudadan i toŋan nijzauʔ~ʡ. * ku pakinʦar~ɾan i toŋan nijazuʔ~ʡ. * ku kjukaj i toŋan nijzauʔ~ʡ.
